description_long: This is a grand marble sculpture featuring two human figures and an angelic figure, all dramatically posed atop a rounded pedestal. The central male figure appears to be supported or lifted by the angel, whose wings are spread wide and whose expression is compassionate. The figures are rendered in high detail, with flowing drapery and expressive postures, suggesting a narrative of salvation or ascension. The pedestal is ornately carved with inscriptions and reliefs, and the backdrop is a curved wall adorned with bas-relief scenes. The entire composition is monumental and classical, evoking themes of heroism and transcendence.
description: A detailed marble sculpture of two human figures and an angel atop an ornate pedestal, set against a curved relief wall.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full composition, with the angel supporting the male figure and the detailed reliefs and inscriptions on the pedestal and wall.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the figures and the curvature of the pedestal, with the angel's wings and the male figure's posture more pronounced.
description_view_2: The rear view is mostly obscured, showing a flat, dark surface with little visible detail of the sculpture itself.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the dramatic extension of the figures and the rounded form of the pedestal, with the angel's wings and the male figure's back visible.
attribute_subject_matter: angelic figure supporting a human, with classical reliefs
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears to be installed against a decorative wall, likely in a formal indoor or semi-outdoor public space such as a memorial hall or gallery.
